title: Explore the Enchanting Giant's Causeway

scenes.text: These perfectly shaped basalt columns are a true natural wonder.
This is Giant's Causeway, located in County Antrim, Northern Ireland.
Formed by volcanic activity, these columns are around 60 million years old.
The stunning view of the Atlantic Ocean complements the columns beautifully.
scenes.label: ATLANTIC OCEAN VIEW

scenes.text: Follow if you love to travel from your screen.

description: 📍 Giant's Causeway, County Antrim - United Kingdom. A breathtaking natural formation of unique basalt columns. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
